ddls:
CREATE TABLE "frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame */,
  "timestamp_ms" INTEGER /* Timestamp in milliseconds for the frame */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp in HH:MM:SS format */,
  "brightness" INTEGER /* Brightness value for the frame */,
  "avg_brightness" INTEGER /* Average brightness value calculated over a set of frames */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the frame image */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the frame */,
  "codec" TEXT /* Codec used to compress the frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "video_name" TEXT /* Name of the video */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the video */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the video */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the video was recorded */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera that recorded the video */,
  "video_format" TEXT /* Format of the video */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera */,
  "camera_name" TEXT /* Name of the camera */,
  "camera_type" TEXT /* Type of the camera */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the camera */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the camera is installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_videos" (
  "frame_video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between frame and video */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic result */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame the result is for */,
  "analytic_type" TEXT /* Type of analytic performed (e.g., motion detection, object tracking) */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Details of the analytic result */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analytic result */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Alert level of the analytic result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_results_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the video */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Actions performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytic result the notification is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to be notified */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES analytics_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the external system */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the external system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "auth_token" TEXT /* Authentication token for the external system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the integration the event is related to */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the event was an error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_logs_integration_id FOREIGN KEY ("integration_id") REFERENCES integrations ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
